task_description: Investigate the effect of varying the proximity threshold (from 50 to 200 characters) on the set of entity pairs retained and on the resulting top-ranked phrases.
adaptation_notes: LLM suggested testing thresholds in steps of 25 characters and plotting the Jaccard similarity of the top-10 ranked sets across thresholds. All code was independently implemented.
top_5_prompts: What happens to the set of co-occurring entity pairs retained when the proximity threshold is raised from 100 to 200 characters?
Write code to simulate how varying the proximity threshold between 50 and 200 characters changes the Jaccard similarity of the resulting top-10 phrase ranking.
At what threshold does the proximity filter stop being meaningful, i.e., when do essentially all pairs within a tweet pass the filter?
How does relaxing the proximity constraint affect precision vs recall for entity-pair discovery?
Is 100 characters the right threshold for tweets of up to 280 characters? What would you set it to and why?
